title: nuttallia triangulata
intro: Nuttallia triangulata, also known as the Three-angled Nuttallia or Three-angled Yew, is a species of flowering plant in the family Taxaceae. This evergreen shrub has medicinal properties due to its taxine alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Nuttallia triangulata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antitumor and antiviral properties. Nuttallia triangulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use requires caution and careful dosing due to its toxic compounds.
